description: Iphicrates modernized the Athenian army by replacing heavy hoplite equipment with lighter armor, longer spears, and longer swords. His reforms increased mobility and tactical flexibility while reclaiming valuable bronze from obsolete equipment.
tooltip: Reforms the Athenian infantry after the innovations of Iphicrates. Recover 200 Metal by replacing heavy bronze equipment with lighter arms and armor. Infantry move 5% faster. Spearmen gain +1 melee range and attack 200 ms faster. Swordsmen gain +0.5 melee range and attack 50 ms faster. All melee infantry lose 1 Hack and 1 Pierce Resistance due to their lighter equipment.
